title: Social Content Asset
description: Platform-independent social publishing asset that carries shared AI output plus per-platform formatted payloads for X, Telegram, and Discord. Reuses the same internal social content contract as Meta publishing. Produced by module 13 (daily) or module 11-intraday (story). Passed to module 14 (daily) or the intraday social story delivery module.

topic_slug.description: Topic slug. Matches the topic the content was generated for.

asset_type.description: Whether this is a feed-style daily post or a story-style asset.

source_type.description: What source triggered this asset: a completed daily summary or a high-priority intraday alert.

source_id.description: For alert-sourced assets: the item_id of the originating alert. For daily_summary assets: null or 'daily'.

publish_job_id.description: D1 publish_jobs row ID for daily_summary-sourced assets. Null for alert-sourced assets.

ai_output.description: Raw validated AI output from the social_content_post schema (same as meta_social_post — platform-independent).

enabled.description: Whether X publishing is enabled for this asset.

post_text.description: X-formatted post text. Truncated to 280 characters with hashtags included. Derived from ai_output.post_caption.

thread.description: Optional thread continuation posts for longer content. Each item is one tweet in the thread. Null when threading is disabled.

alert_text.description: Short alert/story text for X. Null for daily_post asset_type.

enabled.description: Whether Telegram publishing is enabled for this asset.

message_html.description: Telegram HTML-formatted message. Uses Telegram-supported HTML tags (b, i, a, code, pre). Max 4096 characters.

alert_html.description: Telegram HTML-formatted alert message. Null for daily_post asset_type.

enabled.description: Whether Discord publishing is enabled for this asset.

embed.description: Discord embed object ready for webhook delivery.

alert_embed.description: Discord embed for alert/story messages. Null for daily_post asset_type.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this asset was generated.

ai_output.post_caption: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates.
ai_output.image_prompt: Professional financial chart with Bitcoin price rally
ai_output.story_background_hint: Dark gradient with orange Bitcoin symbol
ai_output.cta: Full daily crypto briefing — link in bio.

x.post_text:
🪙 Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates.

#crypto #bitcoin #BTC #ETF

telegram.message_html: 🪙 CRYPTO Daily Briefing — 2025-01-15 Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates. Full daily crypto briefing — link in bio. #crypto #bitcoin #BTC #ETF

embed.title: 🪙 Crypto Daily Briefing — 2025-01-15
embed.description: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates.

fields.name: CTA
fields.value: Full daily crypto briefing — link in bio.
